title: astragalus auratus
intro: Astragalus auratus, also known as the Golden Milk Vetch, is a plant species within the legume family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, due to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus auratus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions such as fatigue, colds, and respiratory issues. Astragalus auratus can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
